statement: In every magma, Equation 2810 (`x = ((y * z) * (z * y)) * z`) implies Equation 2299 (`x = (y * (x * (x * z))) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0953
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op z y)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op x (op x z))) w)
